name: Rosette
author: Mark Berger (Richard Kramberger), 1975 — module by the Abstract Games factory
description: Rosette (Mark Berger, 1975) transposes Go to the vertices of a honeycomb — every interior point has three neighbours. All the usual Go rules apply, plus one: a group that surrounds a small hexagon (six like-coloured stones = a rosette) lives forever and can never be captured. Chinese/area scoring after two passes.
